title: Make tsc --noEmit pass in the board UI
description:
Context: internal/tickboard/ui has ~203 pre-existing 'pnpm exec tsc --noEmit' errors that neither vite build nor vitest gate. Reviewers flagged the clusters twice: (1) src/comms/mock.ts does not implement fetchTicks from the CommsClient interface (real non-conformance); (2) src/comms/cloud.ts Tick/OutgoingMessage mismatches and a 'tick_created' message type used by code but missing from the generated websocket union - if the worker/client genuinely send tick_created, add it to schemas/websocket/messages.schema.json and follow the REPO RULE: regenerate BOTH outputs (make codegen-go AND scripts/build-ui.sh) and commit everything including refreshed static/; if it is dead code, remove the usage instead; (3) ambiguous re-exports in src/types/generated/index.ts; (4) cssText errors in tick-activity-feed.test.ts; (5) missing afterEach import in cloud-unit.test.ts; plus whatever remains - fix ALL errors, zero tolerance.

Verification: 'pnpm exec tsc --noEmit' exits 0 in internal/tickboard/ui; pnpm test still green; go test ./... green if schema/codegen changed.

Do NOT add a CI step - the orchestrator wires CI afterward. Do NOT change runtime behavior except where a type error reveals a real bug (report those explicitly).
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit exits 0 in internal/tickboard/ui; vitest suite still green; any schema change regenerated through both codegens with static rebuilt
